title: Kenyan Chickpea Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful salad inspired by Kenyan cuisine, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Salad
ingredients.notes: Mixed greens with lettuce, spinach, and arugula

ingredients.name: Floral Dressing
ingredients.notes: Made with olive oil, lemon juice, and honey

ingredients.name: Crispy Onions
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced and fried until crispy

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the salad and chickpeas.
In a small bowl, whisk together the floral dressing ingredients.
Pour the dressing over the salad and chickpeas, and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the crispy onions over the top of the salad.
